title: Iridescent Shoe Showcase Studio
description: A virtual product photography studio where an iridescent lamp illuminates a shoe on a rotating pedestal. The user adjusts the lamp's iridescence properties, switches shoe material variants, controls the spotlight color and intensity, repositions the lamp around the shoe, and captures a final showcase pose by locking all parameters within valid ranges.
prompt:
Create a single HTML file using Three.js r170 (importmap with three and three/addons from cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/three@0.170.0). Load both GLB models using GLTFLoader: MaterialsVariantsShoe.glb placed on a circular pedestal at the origin, and IridescenceLamp.glb positioned to the right at (2, 1, 0) aiming toward the shoe. Use a PerspectiveCamera at (0, 2, 5) with OrbitControls. Add ambient light (intensity 0.3) and a PointLight parented to the lamp model (intensity 2, color white). Build a GUI panel (lil-gui or HTML controls) with these interactions: (1) A dropdown to switch shoe material variants using the KHR_materials_variants extension data from the shoe GLTF — enumerate all variants and apply them via selectVariant. (2) A slider for lamp iridescence intensity (0.0–1.0) that iterates all lamp meshes and sets material.iridescence to the chosen value. (3) A slider for lamp iridescence IOR (1.0–2.33) that sets material.iridescenceIOR on lamp meshes. (4) A color picker that changes the PointLight color attached to the lamp. (5) A slider for PointLight intensity (0–5). (6) A rotation slider (0–360 degrees) that orbits the lamp model around the shoe on a circular path of radius 2.5 at height 1, always facing the shoe using lookAt. (7) A 'Capture Showcase' button that validates all parameters are within range, freezes OrbitControls, plays a 2-second smooth camera dolly-in animation toward the shoe using requestAnimationFrame interpolation, then displays a green banner 'Showcase Captured!' for 3 seconds. Add a reflective ground plane using MeshStandardMaterial with metalness 0.9 and roughness 0.1. Ensure the render loop runs continuously with tone mapping set to ACESFilmicToneMapping and outputColorSpace set to SRGBColorSpace. The scene background should be a dark gradient using a CanvasTexture.

[State Exposure (required)]
Expose window.__3D_STATE__ updated every animation frame:
window.__3D_STATE__ = {
  shoeVariantIndex: number,         // current material variant index applied to the shoe model (0-based)
  lampIridescence: number,         // iridescence intensity of the lamp material (0.0 to 1.0)
  lampIridescenceIOR: number,         // iridescence IOR of the lamp material (1.0 to 2.33)
  spotlightColorHex: number,         // hexadecimal color value of the PointLight (e.g., 0xffffff)
  spotlightIntensity: number,         // intensity of the PointLight attached to the lamp (0 to 5)
  lampRotationDegrees: number,         // orbital rotation angle of the lamp around the shoe in degrees (0 to 360)
  lampPositionX: number,         // current X coordinate of the lamp model in world space
  lampPositionZ: number,         // current Z coordinate of the lamp model in world space
  pedestalRotationSpeed: number,         // rotation speed of the shoe pedestal in radians per frame
  totalVariantsCount: number,         // total number of material variants available for the shoe model
  isLampLoaded: boolean,         // whether the IridescenceLamp.glb model has been successfully loaded
  isShoeLoaded: boolean,         // whether the MaterialsVariantsShoe.glb model has been successfully loaded
}
